application_timing.outside_uk: The earliest you can apply for a visa is 6 months before you start your course.
application_timing.inside_uk: The earliest you can apply is 3 months before your course starts. You must apply before your current visa expires. Your new course must begin within 28 days of your current visa expiring.

visa_type_detail.name: Child Student visa
visa_type_detail.description: If you’re 16 or 17 and you want to study at an independent school in the UK, you may be eligible for a Child Student visa instead.

visa_type_detail.name: Graduate visa
visa_type_detail.description: A Graduate visa will allow you to stay in the UK after successfully completing your course for:
stay_duration: 2 years if you apply on or before 31 December 2026
18 months if you apply on or after 1 January 2027
3 years if you completed a PhD or other doctoral qualification

essential_apps.description: The official UK government app for accessing government services and information.
Access your NHS account to book appointments, order repeat prescriptions, and more.
Comprehensive public transport app for London and other major UK cities.
Popular digital banking app for international money transfers and spending.
Mobile banking app for managing Barclays accounts in the UK.
